title: Write a Strong Opening
description: Draft openings that earn the reader's attention.
content:
I'm writing {{piece}} about {{topic}}.

Draft 3 distinct openings that earn attention without clickbait or throat-clearing. Vary the move: one that opens on a concrete specific, one on tension or a question, one on a surprising claim. For each, one line on who it suits and the risk it carries. Then recommend one and say why it fits the piece and audience best.
